basic_details.short_information: Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) Apprentice Notification 2026 has been released on 14 June 2026 on the official BBMB website. A total of 16 vacancies have been announced through the BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th class with minimum 40% marks from recognized Board, ITI National Trade Certificate in respective trade from NCVT/SCVT, Aadhaar Card compulsory
qualification.details: Lineman: 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Lineman trade from NCVT/SCVT. Electrician: 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Electrician trade from NCVT/SCVT. Aadhaar Card is compulsory for all applicants.

selection_process: Merit list based on 30% weightage to 10th class and 70% to ITI marks Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BBMB Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BBMB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the BBMB Apprentice posts is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the BBMB Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed their 10th class with a minimum of 40% marks from a recognized board and possess an ITI National Trade Certificate in the relevant trade from NCVT/SCVT. An Aadhaar Card is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Apprentice post at BBMB?
faq.answer: There are a total of 16 vacancies for the Apprentice post at the Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB). These are distributed across different trades as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) applying for the BBMB Apprentice recruitment. This makes the application process more accessible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for BBMB Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the creation of a merit list. This list will be based on a 30% weightage given to 10th class marks and a 70% weightage to ITI marks. Document verification will follow.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the BBMB Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: The Apprentice positions at the Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) are contractual in nature. This means the employment is for a fixed term as per the apprenticeship rules.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the BBMB located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for posts under the Bhakra Beas Management Board, with the application process and potential work location being in Haryana, specifically Ambala.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Haryana apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification specifies Haryana as the state for this recruitment. While it doesn't explicitly restrict applications from outside the state, candidates should check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of Apprentice posts by the Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) is 01/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation provided for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information on age criteria and any applicable relaxations.
